message.content: {"roles":[{"name":"旁白","description":"叙述者，负责环境描述和叙述","suggested_voice":"故事-逗叔君.wav"},{"name":"战彦寒","description":"冷厉克制的男主人，语气强势压迫感强","suggested_voice":"新云浩宇(影视模式).wav"}],"segments":[{"text":"我本是一只无忧无虑的宠物猫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"却因嘴馋偷喝了一口主人的可乐","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"没想竟从猫咪变成了人类","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"还好巧不巧的被主人战彦寒","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"撞个正着","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"此时我裹着猫毯躺在床上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒还以为我是哪个对家","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"派来的诱饵","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"二话不说掐住我的脖子","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"眼神冷得像冰","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"你是怎么进来的","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我肚子上全是淤青","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"身上也被划得鲜血淋漓","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"手心还在冒血","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"可战彦寒根本不吃这一套","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"认定我这是为了爬床","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"演的苦肉计","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"他满眼嫌弃","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"哑巴了","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.6,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"那声音冷得我直哆嗦","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我惊恐地一抬头","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒整个人都僵住了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"不是被我的美貌惊艳","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"而是因为我那双祖母绿的眼睛","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"跟他走丢的那只猫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"一模一样","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"但他眼底的寒意反而更重了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"谁派你来的","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"由于缺氧我的脸涨得通红","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"直到眼角滑下一滴","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"生理性的泪水","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"他才像丢垃圾一样","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"把我甩在地上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我疼得浑身发抖","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"费劲地爬起来","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我不懂人类的羞耻","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"就这么光着身子","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"拉开门往外走","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒听到楼道里的脚步声","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"烦躁地深吸一口气","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"冲过来一把将我拽回去","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"随手从衣柜扯了件衬衫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"丢我头上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我被砸懵了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"委屈得眼泪啪嗒直掉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"喵呜","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我本能地想求饶","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"却发出了猫叫声","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒听我学猫叫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"火气更大了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"穿上衣服","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"立马给我滚","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.8},{"text":"我抽噎着笨拙地","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"把衬衫套反了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"临走前","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我依依不舍地看了他一眼","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"却只见他满脸阴沉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"外头雷雨交加","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"压抑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.3,0.3,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"战彦寒躺在床上翻来覆去","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"睡不着","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"脑子里全是我临走前","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"那个绝望的眼神","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"天一亮门外就传来了动静","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"四爷找到了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"十几个保镖撑着黑伞","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"围在他身后","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒蹲下身","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"冲着躲在草丛里的我拍手","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"西西过来","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"往常我早就扑过去了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"可这次我吓得往后缩","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒脸色一沉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我又滋溜一下","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"text":"钻进了草垛深处","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05}],"assignments":[{"line":1,"role":"旁白","text":"我本是一只无忧无虑的宠物猫","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":2,"role":"旁白","text":"却因嘴馋偷喝了一口主人的可乐","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":3,"role":"旁白","text":"没想竟从猫咪变成了人类","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":4,"role":"旁白","text":"还好巧不巧的被主人战彦寒","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":5,"role":"旁白","text":"撞个正着","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":6,"role":"旁白","text":"此时我裹着猫毯躺在床上","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":7,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒还以为我是哪个对家","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":8,"role":"旁白","text":"派来的诱饵","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":9,"role":"旁白","text":"二话不说掐住我的脖子","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":10,"role":"旁白","text":"眼神冷得像冰","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":11,"role":"战彦寒","text":"你是怎么进来的","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":12,"role":"旁白","text":"我肚子上全是淤青","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":13,"role":"旁白","text":"身上也被划得鲜血淋漓","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":14,"role":"旁白","text":"手心还在冒血","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":15,"role":"旁白","text":"可战彦寒根本不吃这一套","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":16,"role":"旁白","text":"认定我这是为了爬床","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":17,"role":"旁白","text":"演的苦肉计","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":18,"role":"旁白","text":"他满眼嫌弃","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":19,"role":"战彦寒","text":"哑巴了","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.6,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":20,"role":"旁白","text":"那声音冷得我直哆嗦","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":21,"role":"旁白","text":"我惊恐地一抬头","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":22,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒整个人都僵住了","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":23,"role":"旁白","text":"不是被我的美貌惊艳","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":24,"role":"旁白","text":"而是因为我那双祖母绿的眼睛","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":25,"role":"旁白","text":"跟他走丢的那只猫","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":26,"role":"旁白","text":"一模一样","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":27,"role":"旁白","text":"但他眼底的寒意反而更重了","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":28,"role":"战彦寒","text":"谁派你来的","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":29,"role":"旁白","text":"由于缺氧我的脸涨得通红","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":30,"role":"旁白","text":"直到眼角滑下一滴","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":31,"role":"旁白","text":"生理性的泪水","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":32,"role":"旁白","text":"他才像丢垃圾一样","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":33,"role":"旁白","text":"把我甩在地上","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":34,"role":"旁白","text":"我疼得浑身发抖","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":35,"role":"旁白","text":"费劲地爬起来","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":36,"role":"旁白","text":"我不懂人类的羞耻","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":37,"role":"旁白","text":"就这么光着身子","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":38,"role":"旁白","text":"拉开门往外走","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":39,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒听到楼道里的脚步声","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":40,"role":"旁白","text":"烦躁地深吸一口气","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":41,"role":"旁白","text":"冲过来一把将我拽回去","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":42,"role":"旁白","text":"随手从衣柜扯了件衬衫","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":43,"role":"旁白","text":"丢我头上","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":44,"role":"旁白","text":"我被砸懵了","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":45,"role":"旁白","text":"委屈得眼泪啪嗒直掉","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":46,"role":"旁白","text":"喵呜","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":47,"role":"旁白","text":"我本能地想求饶","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":48,"role":"旁白","text":"却发出了猫叫声","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":49,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒听我学猫叫","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":50,"role":"旁白","text":"火气更大了","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":51,"role":"战彦寒","text":"穿上衣服","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":52,"role":"战彦寒","text":"立马给我滚","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.8},{"line":53,"role":"旁白","text":"我抽噎着笨拙地","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":54,"role":"旁白","text":"把衬衫套反了","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":55,"role":"旁白","text":"临走前","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":56,"role":"旁白","text":"我依依不舍地看了他一眼","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":57,"role":"旁白","text":"却只见他满脸阴沉","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":58,"role":"旁白","text":"外头雷雨交加","emotion":"压抑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.3,0.3,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":59,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒躺在床上翻来覆去","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":60,"role":"旁白","text":"睡不着","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":61,"role":"旁白","text":"脑子里全是我临走前","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":62,"role":"旁白","text":"那个绝望的眼神","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":63,"role":"旁白","text":"天一亮门外就传来了动静","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":64,"role":"旁白","text":"四爷找到了","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":65,"role":"旁白","text":"十几个保镖撑着黑伞","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":66,"role":"旁白","text":"围在他身后","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":67,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒蹲下身","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":68,"role":"旁白","text":"冲着躲在草丛里的我拍手","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":69,"role":"战彦寒","text":"西西过来","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":70,"role":"旁白","text":"往常我早就扑过去了","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":71,"role":"旁白","text":"可这次我吓得往后缩","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":72,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒脸色一沉","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":73,"role":"旁白","text":"我又滋溜一下","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"line":74,"role":"旁白","text":"钻进了草垛深处","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05}]}

{"roles":[{"name":"旁白","description":"叙述者，负责环境描述和叙述","suggested_voice":"故事-逗叔君.wav"},{"name":"战彦寒","description":"冷厉克制的男主人，语气强势压迫感强","suggested_voice":"新云浩宇(影视模式).wav"}],"segments":[{"text":"我本是一只无忧无虑的宠物猫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"却因嘴馋偷喝了一口主人的可乐","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"没想竟从猫咪变成了人类","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"还好巧不巧的被主人战彦寒","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"撞个正着","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"此时我裹着猫毯躺在床上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒还以为我是哪个对家","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"派来的诱饵","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"二话不说掐住我的脖子","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"眼神冷得像冰","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"你是怎么进来的","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我肚子上全是淤青","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"身上也被划得鲜血淋漓","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"手心还在冒血","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"可战彦寒根本不吃这一套","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"认定我这是为了爬床","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"演的苦肉计","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"他满眼嫌弃","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"哑巴了","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.6,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"那声音冷得我直哆嗦","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我惊恐地一抬头","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒整个人都僵住了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"不是被我的美貌惊艳","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"而是因为我那双祖母绿的眼睛","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"跟他走丢的那只猫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"一模一样","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"但他眼底的寒意反而更重了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"谁派你来的","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"由于缺氧我的脸涨得通红","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"直到眼角滑下一滴","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"生理性的泪水","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"他才像丢垃圾一样","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"把我甩在地上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我疼得浑身发抖","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"费劲地爬起来","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我不懂人类的羞耻","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"就这么光着身子","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"拉开门往外走","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒听到楼道里的脚步声","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"烦躁地深吸一口气","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"冲过来一把将我拽回去","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"随手从衣柜扯了件衬衫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"丢我头上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我被砸懵了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"委屈得眼泪啪嗒直掉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"喵呜","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我本能地想求饶","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"却发出了猫叫声","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒听我学猫叫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"火气更大了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"穿上衣服","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"立马给我滚","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.8},{"text":"我抽噎着笨拙地","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"把衬衫套反了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"临走前","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我依依不舍地看了他一眼","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"却只见他满脸阴沉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"外头雷雨交加","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"压抑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.3,0.3,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"战彦寒躺在床上翻来覆去","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"睡不着","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"脑子里全是我临走前","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"那个绝望的眼神","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"天一亮门外就传来了动静","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"四爷找到了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"十几个保镖撑着黑伞","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"围在他身后","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒蹲下身","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"冲着躲在草丛里的我拍手","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"西西过来","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"往常我早就扑过去了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"可这次我吓得往后缩","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒脸色一沉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我又滋溜一下","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"text":"钻进了草垛深处","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05}],"assignments":[{"line":1,"role":"旁白","text":"我本是一只无忧无虑的宠物猫","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":2,"role":"旁白","text":"却因嘴馋偷喝了一口主人的可乐","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":3,"role":"旁白","text":"没想竟从猫咪变成了人类","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":4,"role":"旁白","text":"还好巧不巧的被主人战彦寒","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":5,"role":"旁白","text":"撞个正着","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":6,"role":"旁白","text":"此时我裹着猫毯躺在床上","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":7,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒还以为我是哪个对家","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":8,"role":"旁白","text":"派来的诱饵","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":9,"role":"旁白","text":"二话不说掐住我的脖子","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":10,"role":"旁白","text":"眼神冷得像冰","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":11,"role":"战彦寒","text":"你是怎么进来的","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":12,"role":"旁白","text":"我肚子上全是淤青","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":13,"role":"旁白","text":"身上也被划得鲜血淋漓","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":14,"role":"旁白","text":"手心还在冒血","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":15,"role":"旁白","text":"可战彦寒根本不吃这一套","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":16,"role":"旁白","text":"认定我这是为了爬床","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":17,"role":"旁白","text":"演的苦肉计","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":18,"role":"旁白","text":"他满眼嫌弃","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":19,"role":"战彦寒","text":"哑巴了","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.6,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":20,"role":"旁白","text":"那声音冷得我直哆嗦","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":21,"role":"旁白","text":"我惊恐地一抬头","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":22,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒整个人都僵住了","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":23,"role":"旁白","text":"不是被我的美貌惊艳","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":24,"role":"旁白","text":"而是因为我那双祖母绿的眼睛","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":25,"role":"旁白","text":"跟他走丢的那只猫","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":26,"role":"旁白","text":"一模一样","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":27,"role":"旁白","text":"但他眼底的寒意反而更重了","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":28,"role":"战彦寒","text":"谁派你来的","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":29,"role":"旁白","text":"由于缺氧我的脸涨得通红","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":30,"role":"旁白","text":"直到眼角滑下一滴","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":31,"role":"旁白","text":"生理性的泪水","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":32,"role":"旁白","text":"他才像丢垃圾一样","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":33,"role":"旁白","text":"把我甩在地上","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":34,"role":"旁白","text":"我疼得浑身发抖","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":35,"role":"旁白","text":"费劲地爬起来","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":36,"role":"旁白","text":"我不懂人类的羞耻","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":37,"role":"旁白","text":"就这么光着身子","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":38,"role":"旁白","text":"拉开门往外走","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":39,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒听到楼道里的脚步声","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":40,"role":"旁白","text":"烦躁地深吸一口气","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":41,"role":"旁白","text":"冲过来一把将我拽回去","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":42,"role":"旁白","text":"随手从衣柜扯了件衬衫","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":43,"role":"旁白","text":"丢我头上","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":44,"role":"旁白","text":"我被砸懵了","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":45,"role":"旁白","text":"委屈得眼泪啪嗒直掉","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":46,"role":"旁白","text":"喵呜","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":47,"role":"旁白","text":"我本能地想求饶","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":48,"role":"旁白","text":"却发出了猫叫声","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":49,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒听我学猫叫","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":50,"role":"旁白","text":"火气更大了","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":51,"role":"战彦寒","text":"穿上衣服","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":52,"role":"战彦寒","text":"立马给我滚","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.8},{"line":53,"role":"旁白","text":"我抽噎着笨拙地","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":54,"role":"旁白","text":"把衬衫套反了","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":55,"role":"旁白","text":"临走前","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":56,"role":"旁白","text":"我依依不舍地看了他一眼","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":57,"role":"旁白","text":"却只见他满脸阴沉","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":58,"role":"旁白","text":"外头雷雨交加","emotion":"压抑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.3,0.3,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":59,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒躺在床上翻来覆去","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":60,"role":"旁白","text":"睡不着","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":61,"role":"旁白","text":"脑子里全是我临走前","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":62,"role":"旁白","text":"那个绝望的眼神","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":63,"role":"旁白","text":"天一亮门外就传来了动静","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":64,"role":"旁白","text":"四爷找到了","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":65,"role":"旁白","text":"十几个保镖撑着黑伞","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":66,"role":"旁白","text":"围在他身后","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":67,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒蹲下身","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":68,"role":"旁白","text":"冲着躲在草丛里的我拍手","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":69,"role":"战彦寒","text":"西西过来","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":70,"role":"旁白","text":"往常我早就扑过去了","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":71,"role":"旁白","text":"可这次我吓得往后缩","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":72,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒脸色一沉","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":73,"role":"旁白","text":"我又滋溜一下","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"line":74,"role":"旁白","text":"钻进了草垛深处","emotion":"恐惧","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05}]}
